## Coverage Rule

- Summary: Figma is product/design evidence, not the durable SSOT. A Figma node is covered only when it points to an owning domain/API/infrastructure/client boundary and a deterministic follow-up rule.
- Top-down: When Figma changes product meaning, update the owning contracts policy or API DSL first, then regenerate IR/OpenAPI and downstream fixtures.
- Bottom-up: When implementation or harness work finds a contradiction, record the local finding, escalate the owning SSOT, then update this coverage manifest.

### Coverage Entry Details

- `153:12742` 컴포넌트 참여자 드롭다운
  - visible agents are viewer-owned agents plus other users' public agents
  - agent ordering is owned-first, display-name ordered, then agent_id tied
  - task participant assignment and unassignment are command operations
- `153:15931` 댓글 소통
  - the Figma comment label is projected as task-thread messages
  - cold thread collection is fetched before following an advertised active stream
  - daemon progress is batched and projected through typed stream events
  - stop is a SaaS command consumed later by daemon polling
- `153:15932` image 14
- `153:15935` 추가 기획 내용
  - only task/subtask surfaces receive AI Agent assignment
  - admin/owner/public/private visibility controls read and mutation behavior
  - device and runtime operations stay account-owned while agents are workspace-scoped
- `162:23468` 논의 필요
  - Figma node-id=162-23475 resolves fixture-created agent names as mutable and non-unique
  - fixture selection creates a normal agent and never creates a template entity
  - the control plane must not auto-suffix duplicate display names such as 리도(1); agent_id is the stable identity and tie-breaker
  - fixture-created agents follow normal agent editability, RBAC, update, and delete rules
- `156:18767` image 13
- `156:19307` 메뉴바
  - AI Agent, runtime, and agent-management menu placement is a client route affordance
  - route rendering does not create a new daemon or infra fact
- `156:19308` Group 6
- `162:23090` 런타임 설정페이지
  - device/runtime liveness is read from SaaS
  - daemon detail and control are agent-bound SaaS commands
  - public agent daemon control is available to workspace members, private control is admin/owner-scoped
  - Figma node-id=129:17930 is an endpoint-looking runtime settings label, not a canonical base URL, generated path, or live host export
- `164:30658` 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 O
  - desktop webview chooses a workspace before workspace-scoped agent creation
  - fixture selection creates an agent, not a template entity
  - direct setting maps to the normal agent create fields
- `435:60050` 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 X
  - no selectable runtime is derived from device/runtime liveness
  - provider install-card rendering is client/product presentation
  - skipping runtime selection does not create a new AI Agent command
- `164:45736` image 8
- `164:45741` Group 5
- `236:29749` 웹 온보딩
  - auth, terms, invite, app download, and Windows waitlist are product/client/distribution surfaces
  - AI Agent API does not expose waitlist or marketing-consent operations
- `275:22731` 런타임 설정페이지 엠티
  - empty state is derived from the device/runtime read model
  - provider install-card hover and Windows waitlist UI do not add AI Agent API operations
- `432:37336` 에이전트 설정페이지
  - agent profile thumbnail, description, instruction, visibility, runtime, model, editability, and timestamps are contract fields
  - model candidates are runtime-scoped catalog records, not enum members
  - agent add availability is derived from selectable runtime data

## API Generated Annotation Content Policy

- line_1: riido.v2.* generated-client facade path for workspace-scoped client APIs; legacy riido.* labels normalize through the same canonical path rule when observed
- line_2: 종류: Query \| Mutation \| SSE Stream
- line_3: 배경: Korean frontend consumption background
- Rule: Every riido.* Figma annotation must keep the facade generated-client path on the first line, preserve the operation kind, and include a Korean background sentence. Current live labels use riido.v2.aiAgent.* so frontend search follows the workspace-scoped generated client facade directly. The executable inventory below owns operation_kind/background and canonical_generated_path; live Figma annotation text is handoff evidence and must not become a second API SSOT. operation_kind must match generated OpenAPI transport: text/event-stream responses are SSE Stream, non-stream GET operations are Query, and non-GET operations are Mutation. Each facade path in api_generated_annotation_inventory must normalize to a canonical aiAgent.* path and keep the matching v2.* OpenAPI generated path in the same source coverage entry.
- Transport terms: `text/event-stream`, non-stream `GET`, non-`GET`.
- Retired `39:0` `클라이언트 전달`: retired with zero annotations; The category definition still exists in Figma, but live usage is 0. This automation keeps the unused shared design category undeleted unless a design owner explicitly approves removing it.

## Resolved API Generated Annotation Nodes

- `153:8545`: `riido.v2.aiAgent.events.stream` -> `aiAgent.events.stream` (`API Generated`) The Figma handoff note now keeps the facade path on the first line, marks it as an SSE Stream, and explains that clients connect only when the task-thread cold collection returns an active_stream link.
- `236:20768`: `riido.v2.aiAgent.tasks.stop` -> `aiAgent.tasks.stop` (`API Generated`) The Figma handoff note keeps the facade path on the first line, marks it as a Mutation, and explains the daemon/provider stop handoff.

### Coverage Entry Details

- `164:30657` 데스크탑앱 온보딩
  - wireframe onboarding is absorbed by the UI page onboarding sections
  - desktop webview creates agents only through workspace-scoped fixture/direct-create generated paths
  - desktop app owns daemon launch trigger presentation and does not create a separate SaaS API
- `188:27707` macOS
  - macOS onboarding/install presentation is a desktop/client product surface
  - AI Agent API coverage still comes from device/runtime liveness and onboarding generated paths
  - no macOS-specific control-plane endpoint is created by this wireframe
- `188:27708` windows
  - Windows onboarding/install presentation is a desktop/client product surface
  - Windows waitlist or launch-notification actions remain outside the AI Agent generated API
  - no Windows-specific control-plane endpoint is created by this wireframe
- `432:46849` Ex AI - 온보딩 순서 변경 메모
  - Figma revised the onboarding explanation order to agent creation, runtime selection, then workspace selection
  - the first step is a client-local onboarding draft/selection state, not a durable workspace-less Agent record
  - durable v2 fixture/direct create still happens only after the client has selected workspace_id and runtime_id for final submit
- `13:3789` 런타임 absorbed by `162:23090`
  - legacy runtime list wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
  - device/runtime liveness stays the durable read-model contract
  - runtime list rendering does not create a separate legacy endpoint
- `86:9988` 런타임 absorbed by `162:23090`
  - expanded legacy runtime wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
  - 내 기기 daemon facts on a runtime settings surface are reached through device-bound daemon detail policy, while explicit selected-agent daemon access remains agent-bound
  - legacy runtime frame variants do not create route forks
- `17:3551` 에이전트 absorbed by `432:37336`
  - legacy agent list wireframe is absorbed by the current UI agent settings section
  - agent identity, lifecycle, timestamps, and runtime/model fields are owned by agent settings policy and API DSL
  - legacy agent list rendering does not create an alternate agent read model

### Supporting Tool Limitations

- `figma-metadata-page-list-underreports-pages.v1`
  - Tool: Figma get_metadata without nodeId
  - Observed: No-nodeId get_metadata listed only page 129:5215 UI for file MUOd9lctoEHASUStN3vUuK.
  - Authoritative: 129:5215, 42:3014, 0:1
  - Rule: metadata page-list output is supporting evidence only and must not remove expected_pages or non-UI inventories.
  - Normalized: get_metadata without `nodeId`; pages `129:5215`, `42:3014`, `0:1`; must not remove `expected_pages`.
- `figma-headless-file-key-placeholder.v1`
  - Tool: Figma Plugin API use_figma figma.fileKey
  - Observed: A live use_figma root/category inspection for file MUOd9lctoEHASUStN3vUuK returned figma.fileKey=headless while the same invocation successfully read the AI Agent file pages and annotation categories.
  - Authoritative: MUOd9lctoEHASUStN3vUuK, v.1.22 AI Agent
  - Rule: The use_figma runtime's figma.fileKey value is supporting evidence only and must not overwrite figma.file_key, expected_pages, or downstream projection source identity.
  - Normalized: `figma.fileKey=headless`; `MUOd9lctoEHASUStN3vUuK`; authoritative file identity; must not overwrite `figma.file_key`.
- `figma-onboarding-page-load-timeout.v1`
  - Tool: Figma get_metadata nodeId=42:3014 and Figma Plugin API page load for 42:3014
  - Observed: Current live reads of page 42:3014 Wireframe - 온보딩 can time out after 120s in get_metadata(nodeId=42:3014) and in use_figma scripts that attempt full page inventory traversal after await figma.setCurrentPageAsync(page). RIID-4900 live annotation traversal loaded the page far enough to count page.children.length=84 and verify the six onboarding riido.* API Generated annotations, while full top-level node identity capture still timed out; direct getNodeByIdAsync reads for nodes 236:33845 and 236:33847 still returned the six onboarding riido.* API Generated annotations.
  - Authoritative: 42:3014, child_count=84, known_inventory_count=83, unresolved_extra_top_level_node=1, non_ui_top_level_inventory, 236:33845, 236:33847, onboarding_api_generated_annotations=6
  - Rule: a timeout is supporting evidence only and must not rewrite expected_pages downward, remove page 42:3014, remove onboarding inventory, or mark onboarding generated paths unresolved; direct registered-node lookup may be used as fallback evidence for onboarding API Generated annotations when full page traversal times out, and a documented known_inventory_count may lag expected_pages.child_count only for the explicitly unresolved extra top-level node on page 42:3014.
  - Normalized: get_metadata(nodeId=42:3014) after 120s; `Wireframe - 온보딩`; `236:33845`; `236:33847`; six onboarding `riido.*` `API Generated`; must not rewrite `expected_pages`; onboarding generated paths unresolved; `page.children.length=84`; known captured inventory remains 83.
